description:
Create a VeraCrypt hidden volume to establish plausible deniability. 

1. Create a 50MB outer container at '/home/ga/Volumes/plausible_deniability.hc' using AES encryption and SHA-512 hash. Set the Outer Volume password to 'CoverStory2024'.
2. Mount this outer volume and copy all files from '/home/ga/Documents/decoy_data/' into it. Then dismount it.
3. Create a 20MB Hidden Volume within the same container. Set the Hidden Volume password to 'RealSecret!789'. Use AES encryption and SHA-512 hash.

Ensure that after completion, the file can be mounted with 'CoverStory2024' to see the decoy files, AND mounted with 'RealSecret!789' to access the hidden volume.
